questions.question: An AI system is designed to optimize job displacement by automating tasks that are repetitive or mundane. Evaluate this approach from an ethical perspective, considering the potential impact on employment and income inequality. (25 marks)

Aificial intelligence is increasingly being used in healthcare to analyze medical images. What are some of the ethical considerations that need to be taken into account when developing and deploying AI in healthcare? (20 marks)

A company is considering using AI to analyze customer data to predict their loyalty and tailor marketing campaigns accordingly. What are some potential ethical concerns with this approach, and how can they be mitigated? (15 marks)
